titleStmt.title: SII 15.119: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 119. (B.K. No. 30 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar to the right of the entrance into the Jain basti.

This is dated the 6th regnal year of the king, Nandana, Pushya-paurṇame, Monday, lunar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to 1173 A.D., January 1. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, however, did not occur on that day, but on the 25th of December, 1172 A.D.

The inscription describes the One Thousand Mahājanas of Mahāgrahāra Lokkiguṇḍi, an endowment of the illustrious Rāma, who are stated to have been protecting the religious works in conjunction with all the residents of the place.
It registers a gift of money made by Guṇanidhi Kēśava for the worship of the deity in the Basadi (Jain temple) of Balleya Jēmayya. A similar gift was made to the same deity by Āṇīkāṟa Nāgiseṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

kyanāthasya sāsanaṁ jinasāsanaṁ . © svasti yamaniyama
svādhyāya dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāna parāyaṇa
japasamādhiśīḷasaṁpana¨rssamasta guṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta
viditavēdā¨rtthavidyāpāraga[¨rṣa]ṭka¨rmmanirata¨rsaptasōmasaṁsthābhṛtāvagāhana pavi
trīkṛtaśarīra¨rccatu¨rvvēda pāragaraṣṭādaśadha¨rmmaśāstrakuśaḷarēkavākyaracaḷita
dhai¨ryya¨rdhai¨ryyaparākramarāsṛta(śrita) janakaḷpavṛkṣarahitapakṣakṣaya
kara¨rkkaliyugagāṁgēya¨rpparamaparōpakārigaḷāhavadhurandhara¨rssā
pānugrahasama¨rttha¨rkā¨ryyabṛhaspatigaḷēkaikapaṇḍita¨rgrāmanāmō
ttama¨rvvaiṣṇavagītimanōhara¨rppāpabhīrugaḷparanārīdūra¨rdduṣṭavidhvaṁsaka
¨rvviśiṣṭa janāśraya¨rkkāma^(1)^krōdhalōbhamōhaviva¨rjjita¨rdvātriṁśatsahasra
samayā¨rgghyā¨rhadvijakuḷatiḷaka¨rśśaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara śrīrāmaradatti
mahāgrahāra śrīmallokkiguṇḍiyūroḍeya pramukha mahāja
naṁ śrī sāsi¨rvvaru samasta gōle gōbrāhmaṇa¨rmmodalāgi sabālavvaddha¨rnneredu dha¨rmmaṁ
gaḷmaṁ sudha¨rmmadiṁ rakṣitamāgi rakṣisuttamire . © Intu poga¨rttevetta śrī sāsi¨rbbara
priyaputraṁ guṇanidhikēśavana puṇyaprabhāvameṁtendoḍe . śrīyanidhi sadguṇa
gaṇanidhi nayanidhi saujanyanidhi kaḻānidhi dhāvalyayaśōnidhi guṇanidhi kē
śavanudāranidhiyene negaḷdan . © . © Acaḷitavā¨rppu pempacaḷitaṁ narasiṁ
ha padābjabhakti mattacaḷita yuktiyoḷvacaḻitaṁ nijalakṣmiyenalke dhā
triyiṁdacaḷita kēśavaṁ sale nimi¨rccidanātmayaśa^(1)^ prakāśaman .
© svasti śrīmatkaḷacu¨ryya bhujabaḻa cakrava¨rtti rāyamurāri sōyidēvava¨rṣada 6
neya nandana saṁvatsarada puṣyasuddha pau¨rṇnamāse sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇamuttarāya
ṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpātaṁ kūḍida puṇyatithiyoḷtavanidhikēśavadēvaṁ tannaccina kēṇiyalli ballaya
jēmayyana basadiya dēvaraṣṭavidhā¨rccanage Alliyācā¨ryya śrī ṣuṣēna paṇḍitadēvare kālaṁ
ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakamāḍi nūṟippattu hoṁnacinna davaṭṭa gadyāṇa 3 ṟaṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkka tāraṁba
raṁ naḍevantāgi koṭṭaru . Ā puṇyatithiyoḻu Āṇikāṟa nāgiseṭṭiyaru tannāṇiya no
ṭṭa lli balleya jēmayyana basadiya dēvaraṣṭavidhā¨rccanega Ali(lli)yācā¨ryya paṇḍi
tadēvara kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi gadyāṇa 10 Ācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍevantāgi
koṭṭaru . yintī dha¨rmmamanārō¨rvva¨rkkēṇikāṟaruṁ Āṇikāṟaruṁ taṁtammadha¨rmma mendu ye
llā kālaṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . Ivanī yaṁdadeneyde rakṣisidavaṁgiṣṭā¨rtthasaṁ saṁbha
vikuṁ pūṇdaḷidage gaṁge gaye kēdāra gurukṣētrameṁbivaṟoḻu pēsade pā¨rvvara go
vara gōbṛṁdamaṁ striyaraṁ tave goṁdikkida pāpameydugumavaṁ bīḷguṁ nigō daṁgaḷoḷu .The next line is
Digital edition of SII 15.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
